mnemonics.title: Review Stages
mnemonics.content: SIDECAR: Search, Include, Data Extract, Evaluate, Compare, Analyze, Report

mnemonics.title: Quality Criteria
mnemonics.content: CRABS: Credibility, Relevance, Accuracy, Bias, Scope

acronyms.expansion: Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses

visualTips.visualization: Venn diagram showing keyword overlaps in databases
Flowchart with filtering stages from 1000+ papers to 50 key papers

analogies.analogy: Like building a jigsaw puzzle - identifying pieces (sources) that fit your research picture
Similar to following breadcrumb trails to discover connected works
